phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main luxury boutiques are on this street
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les principales boutiques de luxe sur la rue d'Antibes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay pran-see-PAL boo-TEEK deh LYOOKS soor lah ROO dan-TEEB
phrases.cultural_note: Rue d'Antibes is Cannes' main shopping street — a 1.5km stretch with fashion, jewellery and lifestyle boutiques.

responses.english: Toward the middle of the street.
responses.phonetic: vehr luh mee-LYUH duh lah ROO
responses.local: Vers le milieu de la rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a department store on this street
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un grand magasin sur la rue d'Antibes ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un gran mah-gah-ZAN soor lah ROO dan-TEEB
phrases.cultural_note: Galeries Lafayette has a branch on Rue d'Antibes — good for French fashion, cosmetics and gifts.

responses.english: No, but there are shopping arcades.
responses.phonetic: nohn, meh eel ee ah day gah-luh-REE
responses.local: Non, mais il y a des galeries.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if shops are open on Sunday
phrases.text_local: Les boutiques de la rue d'Antibes sont-elles ouvertes le dimanche ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay boo-TEEK deh lah ROO dan-TEEB son-TEL oo-VEHRT leh dee-MANSH
phrases.cultural_note: Many shops on Rue d'Antibes open on Sundays in tourist season — unusual in France where Sunday trading is restricted.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they do tax-free shopping
phrases.text_local: Proposez-vous la détaxe pour les achats des touristes étrangers ?
phrases.pronunciation: pro-po-ZAY voo lah day-TAKS poor lay za-SHA day too-REEST ay-tran-ZHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Non-EU visitors spending over €100 in one store can claim back French VAT (TVA) — ask for a détaxe form at the till.

responses.english: Yes, at the checkout with your passport.
responses.phonetic: wee, ah lah KESS ah-VEK voh-truh pass-POR
responses.local: Oui, à la caisse avec votre passeport.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the nearest shoe shop
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'indiquer le magasin de chaussures le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo man-dee-KAY leh mah-gah-ZAN deh shoh-SOOR leh ploo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: French shoe shopping is a pleasure — look for local brands like André and Minelli alongside international names.

responses.english: A bit further down, on the left.
responses.phonetic: uhn puh ploo BAH, soor lah GOHSH
responses.local: Un peu plus bas, sur la gauche.
